summary: Tested phone search in Reservaciones and swap-name-event toggle in Apariencia. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone search (+502 -> 1 result for Ana Martinez), event type search (Quinceañera -> 1 result) both work. Toggle data-testid=toggle-swap-name-event in Apariencia > Completo tab works: enables swap showing event type (Boda/Quinceañera with icon) in primary column and client name secondary. localStorage key 'swap_name_event_type' persists across reloads (true/false). Disabling toggle returns to normal (client name primary).

test_results.1_search_placeholder: PASS - 'Buscar por nombre, teléfono, evento, lugar…'
test_results.4_toggle_found: PASS - Toggle found at data-testid='toggle-swap-name-event' in Apariencia > Completo tab
test_results.5_toggle_enabled: PASS - When enabled, primary column shows event type (Boda/Quinceañera with icon), secondary shows client name
test_results.6_toggle_disabled: PASS - When disabled, returns to normal (client name primary, event type in TIPO column)
test_results.7_localstorage_persistence: PASS - localStorage key 'swap_name_event_type' = 'true'/'false', persists across page reloads
